mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_ISSUE( ID, PROJECT_ID, TASK_ID, REPORTER_USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_ISSUE_PK.nextval, #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{reporterUserId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TF_ISSUE SET PROJECT_ID = #{projectId}, TASK_ID = #{taskId}, REPORTER_USER_ID = #{reporterUserId}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, STATUS = #{status}, CREATED_AT = #{createdAt}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE ID = #{id}
